name: Stuffed Tomatoes-1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut a thin slice from the top of each tomato and scoop out pulp, leaving shell.
Do not peel tomatoes.
2. Drain shells upside down for 20 minutes.
3. Spread inside of each shell with 1 teaspoon of mustard.
4. Divide corn and bacon into tomatoes.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese over each tomato.
6. Arrange tightly in a baking dish and bake uncovered at 375°F for 30 minutes,
or until golden brown on top.
Serves 8
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
